typography.rules: Never use Inter or Roboto for headings. Do not default to Bold for headers; use Light or Black for impact.

spacing_and_layout.glassmorphism_dark: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)] saturate-150
spacing_and_layout.glassmorphism_light: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-xl border border-black/5 rounded-xl shadow-sm saturate-150
spacing_and_layout.rules: Generous spacing. Containers with borders must have internal padding. Grid items must be direct children. Use the Control Room bento grid for the dashboard.

component_rules.charts: Use Shadcn chart components or Recharts with transparent backgrounds and brand colors. No solid white backgrounds in dark mode.
component_rules.tables: Shadcn UI table, go flat, rectangular, dense styles.
component_rules.buttons: Glass button for secondary, solid primary color for main CTA. Explicitly set text color on hover (e.g., hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-white).
component_rules.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Form. Never use native input.

animations_and_motion.reveal: Use framer-motion staggered fade-in up for lists.
animations_and_motion.3d_scene: Use React Three Fiber (R3F) + Drei for the 3D Holographic avatar. Must include <Environment> and <Float> for realistic lighting and movement. Set canvas background to transparent to blend with the UI.

midnight_cinematic_bg.description: Deep midnight blue cinematic abstract background
midnight_cinematic_bg.usage: Use as the main global background image in dark mode.

serenity_mode_bg.usage: Use as the main global background image when Serenity Mode is active.

user_avatar_1.description: A woman wearing glasses and a white blazer

user_avatar_2.description: A man in a suit sitting at a desk
user_avatar_2.usage: Alternative user profile picture or AI persona avatar

user_avatar_3.description: A woman in a black blazer and top

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all icons. Already installed.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing. Use kebab-case, role-based, e.g., data-testid='chat-submit-button'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over glassmorphism has text-shadow or adequate opacity for minimum 4.5:1 ratio.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement customizable themes with 'Midnight Cinematic' as the default dark mode and 'Serenity Mode' as the light mode. Use the provided background images for the respective themes. Build the dashboard using the 'Control Room' Bento Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4). For the 3D Holographic avatar, use React Three Fiber with `<Environment>` and `<Float>` for realistic lighting and movement. Ensure all interactive components have proper hover states, and EVERY interactive element MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute. Create all new component files as .js files, not .tsx.
